data.body: EPIC PLAN-REVIEW: PASS, attestation signed. 15 advisories, 0 blocking. Triage: (1) 8f43 impact0.85 - use deterministic barrier/instrumented seam not sleep in the symlink lock-identity test [WILL HONOR in test design]. (2) df7b impact0.33 - analyze _acquire_fcntl caller impact (callers expecting LockTimeout/-1 sentinel) before changing errno handling [WILL ANALYZE]. (3) shared-file coordination advisories (df83+bdbe gitutil.py; df7b+b1ea lock.py; 2202+8f43 test_lock_stale_reclaim.py; 6b2c+e4cf test_code_review_ws5.py) RESOLVED by sequential relation-chain stack strategy - each change builds on prior, no parallel worktree races. (4) doc-for-barrier-pattern advisory impact0.264 deferred as out-of-scope (remediation epic, pattern self-evident in tests). Remaining advisories impact 0.0 informational. Now claiming epic.
